title: QuickBooks Integration for Monday.com

posts.author: mrautomation (Virtenia Sync - Integration for QuickBooks)
posts.cookedHtml:
The QuickBooks integration is here!

We built this integration because, like many others in the community, we wanted to deeply connect Monday.com with our accounting tool of choice, QuickBooks.

The QuickBooks integration will give you the power to track all past and new invoices (along with their statuses), create and edit customers AND invoices, and other features that will save you time and money (mostly because you won’t have to buy Tylenol for all of those headaches!).

We run our business on Monday.com, and we automate a lot of our workflows on top of an iPaaS tool called Integromat (it’s like Zapier but more powerful). We have been helping clients automate their accounting workflows with Integromat for a while now, and realized that we could help more people by creating this Monday.com App.

We would love for you to try out the QuickBooks integration. All you need is a Monday.com account and you can set up a demo here!

Please expect this survey to take up to 6 minutes to complete. Once you finish, you’ll be able to book a demo to start integrating QuickBooks into your Monday.com environment!

Please give us feedback, we love learning and iterating to make our processes and products the best they can be!

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
First of all, I would like to welcome you to the monday .com community!

The monday dot com QuickBooks integration allows you to prepare invoices online quickly and easily and reduces the need for traditional accounting processes. With monday.com QuickBooks integration, it is possible for you to transfer payments, handle a large volume of numerical information, and track expenses with a few clicks. With this integration, you can drive seamless inventory and accounting management. Experts from the monday .com recognized partner can help you set up this integration seamlessly.

Regards
Neelam B
Damco Solutions
Phone: +1 609 632 0350 | Email : info@damcogroup.com

posts.author: mrautomation (Virtenia Sync - Integration for QuickBooks)
posts.cookedHtml:
Amaury,

Our pricing is $95 for non-Monday Enterprise users and $145 for Monday Enterprise users. Discounts of 50% are available when paid for annually.

This amount is billed following a 14-day free trial, and the product allows you to connect to your QuickBooks account directly so that there can be a two-way sync between QuickBooks and Monday.

The integration facilitates an automated two-way sync between QuickBooks Online and Monday for customer and invoice records and connects directly into your Monday workspace.

In addition to this automated two-way sync, the product offers a plethora of other features such as AutoCreate Individual Invoices, AutoCreate Recurring Invoices, and the ability to send QuickBooks invoices to your customers, directly from Monday.

To start a free trial for the QuickBooks Integration, you can follow these steps (the steps take 2-3 minutes).

To see a complete overview of the product’s features and functionality, watch this video.

Please let us know if you have any additional questions.

Best regards,
Platform Pioneers

posts.author: ProtocastJLC (Chris List)
posts.cookedHtml:
@mrautomation I went ahead and got the free trial for your integration. However, I was unaware it was strictly for Quickbooks.com, not Quickbooks Enterprise.

Is there potential for bringing this to an enterprise level using quickbooks web connector?

And Monday Staff! What gives? Quickbooks is only the most popular accounting platform in the world with developer assets for this exact purpose? Kindly pick up the ball.

posts.author: mrautomation (Virtenia Sync - Integration for QuickBooks)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Chris!

Right now, the product provides an integration between QuickBooks Online and Monday. While we do not yet have an integration with QuickBooks Desktop, we plan to deliver this soon, and we will be sure to inform you when that integration is completed.

In the meantime, please do not hesitate to reach out with any additional questions.

Best regards,
Platform Pioneers

posts.author: ONDMTN (Mike Lee)
posts.cookedHtml: @mrantoniojam I’m using Monday.com for CRM. We’re a steel fabrication company in the construction industry. Our customer is the general contractor. We currently use Quickbooks Online (QBO) to create an Estimate, send it to contractor for approval, then we create a new “project” in QBO that the accepted estimate is associated with. With QBO Projects, we create an invoice = 50% of estimate value that is sent to contractor request for them to pay 50% deposit. Along the way, we create a 2nd invoice in Projects to collect progress payment for work completed. At the end of project, we do one more invoice as final payment due on the overall estimate/project. I reviewed your demo and website. It looks like you only sync customer data and invoices between Monday.com and QBO. Also looks like you only offer the ability to create a new invoice in Monday.com that is synced with QBO. Do you have on your roadmap the ability to create/sync QBO estimates? In our case, we really only care about creating and viewing Estimates in Monday.com. Perhaps there is way for you to add a 3rd option for Monday sync where you choose Estimates in stead of Invoices or Customers? If not, Can you do this on a consulting basis to customize your QBO integration for our construction industry use case? Please let me know options. Thank you!

posts.author: mrautomation (Virtenia Sync - Integration for QuickBooks)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again everyone!

The “Integration for QuickBooks” app is now “Virtenia Sync”, and Platform Pioneers is now part of Virtenia. The old links forward to the new site, and the marketplace listing page remains the same.

If you’ve tried the app before, I recommend trying again! We’ve polished numerous rough edges and have it running better and more smoothly than ever. We still run the business on monday, and we now use monday service for support - we’re heavy daily monday users committed to the platform.

We can’t promise 24x7 support, but we can promise very high quality support as fast as we can get back to you, given the reality of time zones.

What’s coming next? More features and better user experience, of course. We are eager to hear from current and prospective users about everything you’d like monday/QuickBooks integration to do. We already know the importance of interacting with more kinds of QuickBooks data and ideally time tracking too - but please reach out with the details of anything you’d like to see in the app: team@virtenia.com

What distinguishes this app from others? First, it is specific to Monday and QuickBooks, not a generic syncing tool. Second, it has features that move data in both directions. Third, it is the original tool in this niche and is therefore long proven with many users.

The new team includes @jbaur and @KyleCordes, and we’ll keep this old user for the app around also.
